debug_info.goal:
⊢ ∀ (α nt nt₂ : Type) (cfg : ↑{cfg | ε ∉ cfg.GeneratedLanguage}),
    ∃ cfg₂, coerceLang α (↑cfg).Z (↑cfg).GeneratedLanguage = coerceLang α (↑cfg₂).Z (↑cfg₂).GeneratedLanguage

proof:
intro α nt nt₂ cfg
      exists @generate_equivalent_CNF α nt nt₂ cfg
      exact generate_equivalent_CNF_is_eq α nt nt₂ cfg
failed_attempts: exact generate_equivalent_CNF_is_eq α nt nt₂ cfg
successful_attempts:
intro α nt nt₂ cfg
      exists @generate_equivalent_CNF α nt nt₂ cfg
      exact generate_equivalent_CNF_is_eq α nt nt₂ cfg

intro α nt nt₂ cfg
      exact ⟨generate_equivalent_CNF cfg, generate_equivalent_CNF_is_eq α nt nt₂ cfg⟩

      apply generate_equivalent_CNF_is_eq
